scripts.bootstrap: pnpm run daml:build && pnpm run codegen:daml && pnpm install --config.confirm-modules-purge=false
scripts.daml:test: for pkg in daml-packages/*/; do (cd "$pkg" && dpm test) || exit 1; done
scripts.codegen:daml: dpm codegen-js daml-packages/daml-signer/.daml/dist/daml-signer-0.0.1.dar -o ts-packages/canton-sig/generated/model -s daml.js && dpm codegen-js daml-packages/daml-vault/.daml/dist/daml-vault-poc-0.0.1.dar -o ts-packages/canton-sig/generated/model -s daml.js
scripts.codegen:api: curl -sf http://localhost:7575/docs/openapi -o test/openapi.yaml && pnpm exec openapi-typescript test/openapi.yaml -o ts-packages/canton-sig/generated/api/ledger-api.ts
scripts.codegen: pnpm run codegen:daml && pnpm run codegen:api
scripts.generate: pnpm run clean && pnpm run daml:build && pnpm run codegen && pnpm install --config.confirm-modules-purge=false
scripts.check: pnpm -r run check:types && eslint . && knip && prettier --check .
